    Server - Class in lt.viko.eif.dsimanavicius.task1
    Simple server that sends siunta.xml to a client over network.

    Siunta - Class in lt.viko.eif.dsimanavicius.task1
    Represents a shipment with a list of package items.

    Default constructor required by JAXB.

    Creates a shipment with all fields.
    SiuntaItem - Class in lt.viko.eif.dsimanavicius.task1
    Represents a single package item inside a shipment.

    Default constructor required by JAXB.

    Creates a package item with all fields.
    Siuntos - Class in lt.viko.eif.dsimanavicius.task1
    Wrapper class that holds the list of SiuntaItem objects.

    Default constructor required by JAXB.
